GreenLeaf Co.
Facebook Page

A sample Facebook Business Page I designed for a mock eco-friendly brand. Goal: build brand awareness, grow followers, and drive engagement through consistent posting.

  • ✓Consistent branding across all posts
  • ✓Posting schedule: 5x per week
  • ✓Mix of promotional, educational & engagement posts
  • ✓Replied to all comments within 24 hours
  • ✓Grew mock page from 0 to 500+ sample followers
  • ✓Used Canva for all graphics

About Me

Hi, I'm Dexter Acevedo! 👋

I'm a Computer Science student and Social Media Virtual Assistant from the Philippines. I help businesses grow their online presence through consistent, creative, and engaging content.

💻 Why hire a CS student as your VA? — I understand technology, learn new tools fast, can automate repetitive tasks, and bring a problem-solving mindset to everything I do.

I'm detail-oriented, reliable, and always ready to go the extra mile. Currently open for part-time VA work while finishing my CS degree.
